title: ASR Outdoor Compact Prepper Supplies Survival Kit in Illuminated Dry Box, 38pc
description:

ASR Outdoor Compact Prepper Supplies Survival Kit in Illuminated Dry Box, 38pc

The importance of emergency preparedness when planning any outdoor excursion, whether it be camping, hiking, backpacking, exploring the backcountry, or even a road trip to and from remote areas, cannot be stressed enough. This compact survival kit from ASR Outdoor is great to keep in a vehicle or pack for your next outdoor adventure in the event of an emergency.

Key Features

  • COMPACT SURVIVAL KIT: Great to keep in a vehicle or pack for camping trips, this 38pc survival kit will have you covered in case of an emergency; the survival kit includes a flashlight, mini compass, fire starter, pocket knife, rain ponchos, hand warmers and much more!
  • ILLUMINATED DRY BOX: Measuring 11 x 5 x 7.5 inches, this dry box is waterproof, features a removable three stage COB light, detachable lid and snap latch closure with lock hole to keep all emergency preparedness items secure and free of moisture
  • 55PC FIRST AID KIT: Compact and travel friendly first aid kit comes packed in resealable bag; the first aid kit includes alcohol pads, gauze pads, sting relief wipes, soap wipes and assorted bandages
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Box Dimensions: 11.5 x 5 x 7.5 inches; Total Kit Weight: 3.50lbs; Note: Batteries included for dry box and flashlight

Product Specifications

  • MPN: OJV1RGLL
  • UPC: 810131705725
  • Color: Multi
  • Size: Medium

This survival kit includes the following supplies:

x12 tinder sticks; x2 rain ponchos; x2 Mylar emergency blankets; x2 sets of hand warmers; x2 carabiners; x2 zipper pull precision compasses; x1 55pc first aid kit in resealable bag; x1 3 in 1 match stick container (matches not included); x1 3 in 1 flint rod; x1 glow stick; x1 14 in 1 pocket knife (includes carry pouch); x1 flashlight (batteries included); x1 emergency candle; x1 illuminated dry box (batteries included)

The best part about this kit is that all included components, fit inside the waterproof dry box to keep emergency preparedness items secure, free of moisture and organized when you need them most; having the survival gear and supplies all in one place in the event of an emergency or injury, even a minor one, will help you be better prepared to take on the situation at hand with efficiency and confidence. With a total count of over 100 individual pieces, the prepper supplies survival gear emergency preparedness kit is a must have for your next outdoor adventure.
